membership.title: Membership that rewards label-readers
membership.subtitle: Earn points on everything you buy, and unlock more the longer you stay.

testimonials.title: Trusted by label-readers
testimonials.quote1: Finally a store that shows the expiry before I pay. I ordered at 9am and the courier was at my door by lunch.
testimonials.quote2: They special-ordered a brand I couldn't find anywhere in Egypt. Sealed, authentic, and exactly on the date they promised.
testimonials.quote3: The pharmacist actually called to check the dosage was right for me. That kind of care is rare.
